NICARIANS moving on

May 1996
Journalism & Newsroom

Two NICAR-affiliated journalists have accepted positions at major newspapers: Glaston Ford joins the Corpus Christi Caller-Times and Natalya Shulyakovskaya joins the St. Louis Post-Dispatch's computer-assisted reporting program.

NICARIANS moving on

Glaston Ford, a NICAR graduate researcher, has accepted a job as a computer-assisted reporter at the Corpus Christi Caller-Times.

Also, staff member Natalya Shulyakovskaya has accepted a position with the St. Louis Post-Dispatch's computer-assisted reporting program.
